body:
Brother Ashley,

Please find this Sunday's bulletin attached for your review. I have included the homecoming announcements and the new volunteer recognition segment for the anniversary committee. Please look over the deacon responsibilities listed on page three and let me know if anyone needs to swap duties.

The building crew will arrive at 8:00 AM. I need you there by 8:15 if possible.

In His service,
Pastor Raymond Gaines
Greater Hope Baptist Church
snippet: Brother Ashley, please find this Sunday's bulletin attached for your review...
subject: Sunday Bulletin — Greater Hope Baptist — October 19

body:
Pastor Gaines,

I reviewed the bulletin. Everything looks in order on page three. Brother Dewayne confirmed he can cover the communion table. I will be there at 8:15 as requested.

Also, I wanted to confirm that I have the guest sermon recording from October 5th uploaded and titled. It is ready when the committee needs it.

In His service,
Ashley Rogers
Deacon, Greater Hope Baptist Church
snippet: Pastor Gaines, I reviewed the bulletin. Everything looks in order on page three...
subject: Re: Sunday Bulletin — Greater Hope Baptist — October 19

body:
Dad,

Just wanted to check on the Sunday dinner headcount before Mom starts cooking. James and I plan to bring both kids. Marcus said he is coming but wasn't sure about Keisha. Terri is still a maybe since it's a long drive from Ann Arbor.

Let Mom know by noon Saturday if you can. She always makes too much anyway but she worries.

Love,
Denise
snippet: Dad, just wanted to check on the Sunday dinner headcount before Mom starts cooking...
subject: Sunday Dinner — Headcount for Mom

body:
Denise,

Tell your mother to plan for eight, possibly ten if Terri makes the drive. I will call Marcus this afternoon to pin him down. Keisha is welcome either way.

Your mother has already started on the sweet potato pie, which tells me she is expecting a full house regardless of what I say.

See you Sunday.

Dad
snippet: Denise, tell your mother to plan for eight, possibly ten if Terri makes the drive...
subject: Re: Sunday Dinner — Headcount for Mom

body:
Ha! Yes, she already texted me about the pie. We will be there. I told Terri about the anniversary committee discussion too so she may want to come just for that.

We will see you Sunday, Dad. Malik is excited to see you.

Love,
Denise
snippet: Ha! Yes, she already texted me about the pie. We will be there...
subject: Re: Sunday Dinner — Headcount for Mom

body:
Brother Rogers,

We have a large delivery coming in Friday morning — two extra pallets of canned goods from the Forgotten Harvest partnership. I am hoping you can bring another set of hands if you know anyone with a free morning. We need to be fully sorted before the noon distribution.

Also, the donor receipt backlog from last week is sitting on the side table in the kitchen. If you get a chance to run those through Mailgun before Friday that would help me out considerably.

Thank you as always,
Rhonda Carter
Volunteer Coordinator, Harvest Table Food Bank
snippet: Brother Rogers, we have a large delivery coming in Friday morning...
subject: Friday Shift — Extra Hands Needed

body:
Rhonda,

I will take care of the receipts tonight. As for Friday, I will reach out to Brother Dawson from the church — he has helped before and his schedule is open on Fridays since he retired last spring.

I will be there at 7:45 to help you set up before the delivery arrives.

Ashley Rogers
snippet: Rhonda, I will take care of the receipts tonight...
subject: Re: Friday Shift — Extra Hands Needed

body:
That is wonderful, thank you. If Brother Dawson is available please have him come to the loading dock side — we will start the pallets there.

Thank you for always being so reliable, Brother Rogers. The food bank would not run the way it does without people like you.

Rhonda
snippet: That is wonderful, thank you. If Brother Dawson is available please have him come to the loading dock side...
subject: Re: Friday Shift — Extra Hands Needed

body:
Brother Dawson confirmed. He will be there at 7:45 as well. See you Friday, Rhonda.

Ashley Rogers
snippet: Brother Dawson confirmed. He will be there at 7:45 as well...
subject: Re: Friday Shift — Extra Hands Needed

body:
Dad,

Denise mentioned Mom's rheumatology appointment is next week. I know you always take her but I just wanted to make sure you have the date confirmed. It's Thursday the 23rd at 10 AM with Dr. Okafor. I can call and confirm it for you if that helps.

Also — how is she really doing? She keeps telling me she is fine but I can hear it in her voice that her hands are giving her trouble again.

Love,
Terri
snippet: Dad, Denise mentioned Mom's rheumatology appointment is next week...
subject: Mom's Rheumatologist — Can You Drive Her?

body:
Terri,

I have it on the calendar. I will have her there at 9:45. No need to call — I confirmed with the office last week.

As for how she is really doing: her hands are worse in the mornings when the weather changes. She will not say so but I watch her at the coffee pot. Dr. Okafor has been good about adjusting her medication when it gets bad. We will see what he says Thursday.

Thank you for asking. She appreciates that you check on her even when she says she is fine.

Dad
snippet: Terri, I have it on the calendar. I will have her there at 9:45...
subject: Re: Mom's Rheumatologist — Can You Drive Her?

body:
Thank you, Dad. I figured you had it handled but I worry. Can you let me know what Dr. Okafor says after Thursday? Even just a quick message.

I will try to drive up for Sunday dinner next weekend if Greg can get the kids organized. I miss you both.

Love,
Terri
snippet: Thank you, Dad. Can you let me know what Dr. Okafor says after Thursday?...
subject: Re: Mom's Rheumatologist — Can You Drive Her?

body:
I will send you a word after the appointment. Nothing for you to worry about between now and then.

Tell Greg to get those children in the car and bring them over. Sunday dinner is not the same when the table is half empty.

Dad
snippet: I will send you a word after the appointment. Nothing for you to worry about between now and then...
subject: Re: Mom's Rheumatologist — Can You Drive Her?

body:
Brother Rogers,

The anniversary committee will meet Wednesday at 6:00 PM before Bible study. I need you and Deacon Thompson to review the commemorative book table assignment and confirm the deacon setup duties for December 12th.

Also, I received word that the guest preacher for the anniversary celebration has confirmed. I will share the name with the committee Wednesday evening.

Please bring your calendar.

In His service,
Pastor Raymond Gaines
snippet: Brother Rogers, the anniversary committee will meet Wednesday at 6:00 PM...
subject: 75th Anniversary — Committee Meeting

body:
Pastor Gaines,

I will be there Wednesday at 6:00 PM. I have the deacon duty calendar with me and will coordinate with Brother Deacon Thompson about the commemorative table. The book inventory was at 84 copies as of last week.

I look forward to hearing about the guest preacher.

In His service,
Ashley Rogers
Deacon, Greater Hope Baptist Church
snippet: Pastor Gaines, I will be there Wednesday at 6:00 PM...
subject: Re: 75th Anniversary — Committee Meeting

body:
Brother Ashley,

84 copies is exactly where we need to be at this stage. Good work keeping that count current. See you Wednesday.

In His service,
Pastor Gaines
snippet: Brother Ashley, 84 copies is exactly where we need to be at this stage...
subject: Re: 75th Anniversary — Committee Meeting

body:
Dad,

I checked your Coinbase account last night when we talked. Everything looks fine. Your balance is right where it was last month — I did not make any moves this time. I will walk you through it Sunday at dinner so you can see for yourself.

I am also going to pull up the Alpaca brokerage so we can look at the grandkids gift fund together. The market has been up.

See you Sunday.

Marcus
snippet: Dad, I checked your Coinbase account last night when we talked...
subject: Coinbase — Your Account Balance

body:
Marcus,

That is fine. I will look at it with you Sunday. I appreciate you keeping an eye on those accounts — I would not know where to start without you.

Bring the laptop and walk me through it slowly. Your mother will be in the kitchen, so we will have time at the dining room table.

Dad
snippet: Marcus, that is fine. I will look at it with you Sunday...
subject: Re: Coinbase — Your Account Balance

body:
Will do, Dad. I will bring the laptop. See you Sunday.

Marcus
snippet: Will do, Dad. See you Sunday...
subject: Re: Coinbase — Your Account Balance
